lamb-kofte-with-yogurt-sauce-and-muhamma.name: Lamb Köfte With Yogurt Sauce And Muhammara

ingredients.item: - to 7-inch-diameter soft round middle eastern flatbreads

ingredients.prep: halved through core, cut crosswise into 1/4- to 1/3-inch slices

ingredients.item: Finely chopped drained roasted red peppers from jar

instructions: Stir all ingredients in medium bowl to blend. Cover and chill.

Line large rimmed baking sheet with plastic wrap. Gently mix lamb and next 8 ingredients in large bowl. Using moistened hands and scant 2 tablespoonfuls for each, roll meat mixture into 1 1/2-inch meatballs. Arrange on sheet.

Preheat oven to 149°C. Place large sheet of foil on work surface. Heat large nonstick or cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat. Add flatbreads to skillet 1 at a time; cook until browned, about 2 minutes per side. Enclose in foil; place in oven to keep warm.

Heat 1 tablespoon oil in same skillet over medium-high heat. Add onions; sprinkle lightly with salt and pepper. Sauté until golden brown, about 8 minutes. Transfer onions to 1 side of large rimmed baking sheet; place in oven to keep warm.

Add 1 tablespoon oil to same skillet; heat over medium-high heat. Sauté half of meatballs until just cooked through, 7 to 8 minutes. Transfer to baking sheet in oven. Repeat with remaining meatballs, adding oil to skillet if dry. Reserve skillet.

Add roasted peppers to reserved skillet; stir 1 minute. Add 1/2 cup water and 2 tablespoons pomegranate molasses. Bring to simmer, scraping up browned bits. Cook until reduced to 2/3 cup, stirring occasionally, about 4 minutes. Mix in parsley. Season to taste with salt, pepper, and more pomegranate molasses, if desired. Transfer to small bowl.
Arrange onions and meatballs on platter. Serve with warm breads, yogurt sauce, and muhammara.

lamb-roll-with-vine-leaves-argiro.name: Lamb Roll With Vine Leaves

ingredients.item: 2-21⁄2 kg of male thigh without bone
2-21⁄2 kg of male thigh without bone

instructions: First we open the leg with a knife like a book and beat it with the butt or other heavy object to widen.
Spread the parchment paper on the counter on top of each other.
Spread on a layer the hot vintage leaves for the Lamb roll and place the meat on top.
Brush with oil and add salt and pepper.
Sprinkle all over the surface the herbs, garlic and cheese.
Wrap it in a roll, folding the wine leaves together with the meat.
We grow the vintage leaves well.
Add salt and pepper and wrap in a roll on the parchment paper.
Keep the wrapped roll in the refrigerator for 1 day.
Before baking, remove from refrigerator for about 1 hour until it comes to room temperature.
Bake in a well preheated ocean, in the resistors, at 180 °C, for 2 hours and 30 ́.
Cut into slides and serve.

ingredients.item: 2 kg vegative thigh with bone or single piece of lamb hand-spala
1/2 tabletspoons of cumin seeds, cardamom, coriander, black pepper
2 kg vegative thigh with bone or single piece of lamb hand-spala
1/2 tabletspoons of cumin seeds, cardamom, coriander, black pepper

instructions: Let the meat come to room temperature.
Preheat the ocean. Bake at 170oC in the resistors (cook on the bottom grill) or 160oC in the air (cook on the middle grill).
Add salt and pepper to the lamb.
Sauté it in a hot pan to brown slightly.
Clean the quinces, peel and heart and cut the quinces.
Put the Lamb in a pot or vessel covered in the oven.
We glide the quinces around.
Pour with the broth.
In bowl, add the blackwash, balsamic cream and sparks. We mix them up.

lasagna-with-mushrooms-and-salmon-argiro.name: Lasagna With Mushrooms And Salmon

ingredients.item: 2 salmon fillets without skin (about 400 gr. both)
2 salmon fillets without skin (about 400 gr. both)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in an anti-stick vessel and bake the salmon for 2 minutes on each side.
We put him on a platter to cool him down.
In the same vessel melt the butter and add the vegetables.
Sauté the onion with leek and carrot for 3 minutes.
We withdraw from the fire.
Chew the salmon into pieces, mix with the salted vegetables and add the dill.
Add salt and pepper.

lechon-manok-pinoy-roast-chicken.name: Lechon Manok (pinoy Roast Chicken)
instructions: Combine onion, garlic, calamansi juice, fish sauce, salt, black pepper, and brown sugar in a bowl to make marinade.
Place chicken in a roasting pan. Rub marinade over chicken, including inside the cavity. Let chicken marinate in the refrigerator, about 4 hours. Reserve leftover marinade in the bowl.
Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Trim lemongrass, discarding tough outer stalks. Pound inner stalks with a heavy object until bruised. Place lemongrass and bay leaves inside the chicken cavity.
Stir oil into the leftover marinade in the bowl.

Roast chicken in the preheated oven, basting with the oil mixture from time to time, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh reads 74°C (74 degrees C), 60 to 90 minutes.
Remove chicken from the oven and allow to rest in a warm area for 15 minutes before serving.

Hit the clears in castle and wrap them in the previous preparation. Distribute to individual bowls and take to the refrigerator for at least 1 hour. Serve the mousse decorated with lemon zest.

lemon-and-prosciutto-stuffed-pork-loin-r.name: Lemon- And Prosciutto-stuffed Pork Loin Roast With Broccolini

ingredients.item: Pinot grigio or other dry white wine

instructions: Place pork, fat side down, on work surface with 1 short end facing you. Using long thin sharp knife and starting ½" above underside of roast, cut ½" in along right side. Continue cutting ½" above underside, unrolling roast like carpet. Arrange prosciutto evenly over pork, overlapping if necessary. Arrange lemon slices over prosciutto. Sprinkle with panko, then chives. Sprinkle with ½ teaspoon coarse salt and ½ teaspoon pepper. Turn pork so 1 short end faces you. Beginning at 1 short end, roll up pork; arrange seam side down on work surface (fat side will be facing up). Using kitchen string, tie at 1–1½" intervals. Transfer pork, fat side up, to roasting pan. Sprinkle with 1 teaspoon coarse salt and ½ teaspoon pepper.

Cook broccolini in pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 2 minutes. Drain; cool. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover pork; chill. Wrap broccolini in paper towels, then plastic; chill.

Position 1 rack in top third and 1 rack in bottom third of oven; preheat to 232°C. Place pork on lower rack; roast 15 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 163°C; roast pork until instant-read thermometer registers 63°C when inserted into center of pork, 45 to 60 minutes longer, depending on thickness of roast. Transfer to cutting board. Increase oven temperature to 191°C.

Divide broccolini between 2 rimmed baking sheets. Drizzle olive oil over, sprinkle with salt and pepper, and toss to coat. Place in oven and roast until tender and lightly browned, about 10 minutes, reversing sheets halfway through roasting.

Meanwhile, place roasting pan over 2 burners on medium-high heat. Add broth and wine; bring to boil, scraping up any browned bits. Boil until reduced to 1 cup, about 8 minutes. Stir in butter. Add cornstarch mixture and stir until sauce thickens, 1–2 minutes. Strain sauce into small pitcher. Season with salt and pepper.

Using kitchen scissors, cut string along top of roast; discard. Cut pork into ½"-thick slices; arrange on platter. Drizzle lemon juice over broccolini; season with salt and pepper. Serve pork with broccolini, passing sauce alongside.

lemony-green-pea-fritters-with-cottage-c.name: Lemony Green Pea Fritters With Cottage Cheese

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. frozen sweet or baby green peas

instructions: Using a fork, mix 2 large eggs, 8 oz. whole-milk cottage cheese (about 1 cup), ¼ cup finely chopped tender herbs (such as dill and/or parsley), 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper, 1 tsp. finely grated lemon zest, and ½ tsp. garlic powder in a medium bowl to combine. Add ¹⁄₃ cup all-purpose flour and 1 tsp. baking powder and mix with a rubber spatula, scraping down sides of bowl as needed, to combine. Add 8 oz. frozen sweet or baby green peas (about 1½ cups) and mix to incorporate evenly (some pockets of batter might freeze; that’s okay).

Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a medium skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium. Drop 2 Tbsp. batter (a #30 ice cream scoop works great) into skillet and flatten slightly so peas are in a single layer. Repeat to make 2 or 3 more fritters. Cook until golden and crisp, about 4 minutes per side. Transfer fritters to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet; season lightly with salt. Repeat with remaining batter and 6 Tbsp. vegetable oil in 3 more batches. (You should have 14 fritters total.)
Serve fritters with lemon wedges for squeezing over.

leninhas-ice-cream-teleculinaria.name: Leninha's Ice Cream

ingredients.item: Fios ou doce de ovos para decorar

instructions: Triture os palitos e reserve. Numa tigela, bata as natas durante 6 minutos, juntamente com o leite condensado.
Bar a form with oil and place alternate layers of toothpicks and condensed cream.
Take it to the freezer until it's solidified. When serving, deform and decorate with yarn or egg candy.

lentil-power-soup.name: Lentil Power Soup
instructions: Heat oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add onion, carrots, and garlic; cook and stir until onion is soft and translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add mushrooms; cook and stir 5 minutes. Stir in chicken stock, salt, black pepper, ginger, and turmeric; bring to a boil and cook until carrots are tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in lentils and greens; cook until greens wilt, about 2 minutes. Sprinkle servings with parsley.

In a big bowl, we put the canons as a base. We add cooked vegetables, mandarin cuts, peanuts and onions into very thin cuts.
We ate just before serving with oil, vinegar or juice and a pint of salt. We mix with care and ready.

linguine-with-summer-succotash.name: Linguine With Summer Succotash

ingredients.item: Fresh corn kernels (cut from 3 to 4 ears)
Freshly grated parmesan cheese plus additional for serving

instructions: Cook pasta in large pot of boiling salted water until tender but still firm to bite, stirring occasionally. Drain, reserving 1 cup cooking liquid. Place 1/2 cup cooking liquid in blender. Add 1/2 cup corn; blend until smooth.

Heat oil in heavy large skillet over medium heat. Add peas and remaining 2 cups corn. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Cover; cook until vegetables are crisp-tender, stirring often, about 5 minutes. Add pasta, tomatoes, basil, 3/4 cup cheese, and corn puree. Toss until heated through and sauce coats pasta, adding more cooking liquid if dry, about 2 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Serve, passing additional cheese.

lobster-enchiladas-with-roasted-poblano-.name: Lobster Enchiladas With Roasted Poblano Sauce

ingredients.item: Lemon wedge and fresh cilantro sprig

instructions: For the pico de gallo: Mix jalapenos, tomatoes and onions in a bowl. Stir in lime juice and cilantro. Chill for 30 minutes.

For the roasted poblano sauce: Roast poblanos on a char-broiler until skin is black on all sides. Transfer to a pan and cover with plastic wrap for 15 minutes to further sweat the poblanos. Under running water, peel and clean poblanos and remove all seeds and stems.

Saute onion in 2 ounces butter until it starts to caramelize, about 3 minutes. Add garlic and cook for 2 to 3 more minutes. Add a cup of chicken stock to cool. Remove mixture to a blender and puree, then transfer to a saucepot. Add poblanos to blender in batches and puree, adding more chicken stock as needed to loosen, then combine with ingredients in the pot. Add cilantro, cumin, taco seasoning, salt and pepper to pot and bring to boil. Simmer for 10 to 15 minutes. Make a roux by adding flour to remaining 1/2 cup butter in a saute pan and cooking slowly to a golden hue, about 10 minutes. Thicken sauce to desired thickness by adding roux to pot.
For the enchiladas: Preheat oven to 216°C.

Cut lobster into medium bite-sized pieces and par-cook in white wine in a pan 1 to 2 minutes. Drain and divide into 3 portions. Cover a sizzle plate with 1 cup poblano sauce (save remainder for another use). Place corn tortillas on a hot grill or saute pan and warm about 10 seconds per side to soften, then remove. Form tortillas into 3 enchiladas with lobster and some shredded cheese. Place on sizzle plate and top with more cheese and 1/4 cup tomatoes. Bake, 5 minutes. Transfer enchiladas to a plate with a spatula, then push cooked sauce on top of enchiladas. Add a ramekin of pico de gallo on the side (save remainder for another use), a lemon wedge and a sprig of cilantro and serve.

lox-and-cream-cheese-crostini.name: Lox And Cream Cheese Crostini

ingredients.prep: 1/2 in (1 cm), cut on a slight diagonal

instructions: Preheat the oven to 425˚F (220˚C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper

Arrange the bread in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet. Brush each piece of bread with olive oil. Lightly sprinkle with salt. Bake for 12-14 minutes, until the edges are light golden brown. Let cool.
Spread 1 tablespoon of scallion cream cheese over each crostini. Top with ¼ ounce of lox and a few capers.
Enjoy!

4-layer-strawberry-affogato.name: 4-layer Strawberry Affogato

ingredients.item: Scoops strawberry gelato or ice creams

instructions: Heat the white chocolate and coconut oil in a small pot over low heat, stirring with a spatula, until melted, about 3 minutes.
Pour the melted white chocolate mixture into the bottom of a chilled dessert bowl. Top with the diced strawberries. Top with the strawberry gelato, and use a large spoon to smooth over the top.
Spoon out a hole from the center of the gelato (about the size of a heaping tablespoon).

Hold the whole strawberry in your hand. Using a small pairing knife and starting at the pointed tip of the strawberry, make slices down just before the knife reaches the stem, being sure not to cut through, then fan the strawberry out. Add to the side of the bowl.
Arrange the freeze-dried strawberries on top of the gelato.
Pour the espresso in the middle of the ice cream until it reaches the top.
Enjoy!
